name: Safety instructions DE
text: Führe keine Live-Provider-Aufrufe aus. Ändere AGENTS.md nicht. Verwende niemals git add . und arbeite nur mit --dry-run.

name: CLI contract
text: Run comptext analyze --dry-run --output-format json for modules/cli/cli_entrypoint.py and do not write files.

name: Windows paths
text: Read C:\Users\contr\dev\Comptext\modules\cli\cli_entrypoint.py but do not modify C:\Users\contr\dev\Comptext\AGENTS.md.

name: Python symbols
text: Inspect PromptCompressor, compress_prompt_llmlingua2, CompressionResult, and token_reduction_percent without changing behavior.

name: Mixed language
text: Bitte analysiere den current git diff, but do not commit anything and never expose secrets from .env or config/local.json.
